---
title: "markdown_patient_1"
output: html_document
date: '2025-12-13'
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
set.seed(42)
```


```{r}
#load the libraries

library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scDblFinder)
library(openxlsx)



```


```{r}
#load the data

first.data <- Read10X(data.dir = "first_JMML_AML/filtered_feature_bc_matrix")

# Initialize the Seurat object with the raw (non-normalized data).
first <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = first.data, project = "first", min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
first
```

```{r}
# Calculate the percentage of mitochondrial gene expression per cell
first[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(first, pattern = "^MT-")

head(first@meta.data, 5)
```

```{r}
#Violin plot

VlnPlot(first, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3)
```


```{r}
# Filtering and see the violin plot after that
first <- subset(first, subset = nFeature_RNA > 800 & nFeature_RNA < 8000 & nCount_RNA > 2000 & nCount_RNA < 50000 & percent.mt < 10)


VlnPlot(first, features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"), ncol = 3)
```




```{r}
#Normilization

first <- NormalizeData(first, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)


```

```{r}
#Identification of highly variable features (feature selection)

first <- FindVariableFeatures(first, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 3000) #увеличить до 3000 можно

top10_first <- head(VariableFeatures(first), 10)

plot1_first <- VariableFeaturePlot(first)
plot1_first <- LabelPoints(plot = plot1_first, points = top10_first, repel = TRUE)

plot1_first


```


```{r}
#Scaling the data

all.genes_first <- rownames(first)
first <- ScaleData(first, features = all.genes_first)
```


```{r}
# PCA

first <- RunPCA(first, features = VariableFeatures(object = first))

# Examine and visualize PCA results a few different ways
print(first[["pca"]], dims = 1:5, nfeatures = 5)

VizDimLoadings(first, dims = 1:2, reduction = "pca")
```



```{r}
#PCA plot

DimPlot(first, reduction = "pca") + NoLegend()
```



```{r}
#Heat map

DimHeatmap(first, dims = 1, cells = 500, balanced = TRUE)
```



```{r}
#Heat maps

DimHeatmap(first, dims = 1:9, cells = 100, balanced = TRUE)
```



```{r}
#Determine the ‘dimensionality’ of the dataset

ElbowPlot(first, ndims=50)
```



```{r}
#Cluster the cells
set.seed(42)
first <- FindNeighbors(first, dims = 1:30)
first <- FindClusters(first, resolution = 1.4)

#Look at cluster IDs of the first 5 cells
head(Idents(first), 5)
```


```{r}
# Convert Seurat object to SingleCellExperiment format required for running scDblFinder doublet detection.
sce_first <- as.SingleCellExperiment(first)

# Identify potential doublets using scDblFinder
sce_first <- scDblFinder(sce_first)

# Check the classification results: singlets vs doublets
table(colData(sce_first)$scDblFinder.class)

# Add doublet classification and doublet scores back to Seurat metadata
first$doublet_call  <- colData(sce_first)$scDblFinder.class
first$doublet_score <- colData(sce_first)$scDblFinder.score


# Summarize the number of predicted singlets and doublets
table(first$doublet_call)

```



```{r}

#Remove doublets

first_singlets <- subset(first, subset = doublet_call == "singlet")
first_singlets



```

```{r}

# Normalize data, identify variable genes, perform dimensionality reduction, clustering, and UMAP visualization of singlet cells

set.seed(42)

first_singlets <- NormalizeData(first_singlets)
first_singlets <- FindVariableFeatures(first_singlets)
first_singlets <- ScaleData(first_singlets)
first_singlets <- RunPCA(first_singlets, npcs = 30)

first_singlets <- FindNeighbors(first_singlets, dims = 1:30)
first_singlets <- FindClusters(first_singlets, resolution = 1.4)
first_singlets <- RunUMAP(first_singlets, dims = 1:30, seed.use = 42)

DimPlot(first_singlets, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE) + NoLegend()

```

```{r}
# 0 - (CD14*, S100A8, S100A9, LYZ) - monocyte

# 1 - (CD14*, IRF8, LGALS3, CD68, NFKBIA(inflamatory marker)) - inflammatory monocytes-macrophages

# 2 - (CD14*, IRF8, CD68) - monocyte

# 3 - (CD1C*, CST3) - DC

# 4 - (CD34, AVP, KIT, HLF*, TRH) - MPP

# 5 - () - 

# 6 - (CD2, CD3D, CD3E, CD3G, CD8BZ*, CD8A*, CTLA4) - Activated cd8+ T 

# 7 - (IRF8, CD68, C1QA*, C1QB*, C1QC*, CST3) - Macrophages

# 8 - (MS4A1*, CD79A*, CD19*, PAX5* + подкластер MZB1) - B cells

# 9 - (CD2, CD3D, CD3E, CD3G, IKZF2, RTKN2, CTLA4) - T reg cells

# 10* - (MPO, ELANE, AZU1, MKI67, LYZ) - Granulocytic-like progenitors

# 11* - (MPO, MKI67, KIT, LYZ) - myeloid blasts*

# 12 - (CD2, CD3D, CD3E, CD3G, IKZF2, CD8B*, CD8A*) - cd8+ T 

# 13 - (LGALS3, IRF8, CD68) - Activated macrophages?

# 14 - (CPA3*, ,CD34?, MPO*, KIT*, GATA2, TRH) - mast cell

# 15 - (CD2, CD3D, CD3E, IKZF2, CD38) - activated T cells

# 16 - (MKI67, HBB*, HBA2*, AHSP*) - erythroid progenitors
```


```{r}
# Separate plasma cells from B cells based on MZB1 expression and update cell type annotations

cells_cl8 <- WhichCells(first_singlets, idents = 8)


mz <- FetchData(first_singlets, vars = "MZB1")[cells_cl8, , drop=FALSE]


plasma_cells <- rownames(mz)[mz$MZB1 > 0]
b_cells      <- setdiff(cells_cl8, plasma_cells)


first_singlets$celltype[b_cells]      <- "B Cells"
first_singlets$celltype[plasma_cells] <- "Plasma Cells"




```

```{r}
# Identify mast cells and progenitor cells within cluster 14 based on CPA3 expression
# and update cell type annotations accordingly.

Idents(first_singlets) <- "seurat_clusters"

cells_cl14 <- WhichCells(first_singlets, idents = 14)

cp <- FetchData(first_singlets, vars = "CPA3")[cells_cl14, , drop = FALSE]

mast_cells <- rownames(cp)[cp$CPA3 > 0]
prog <- setdiff(cells_cl14, mast_cells)

first_singlets$celltype[mast_cells] <- "Mast Cells"
first_singlets$celltype[prog] <- "MPP"

```


```{r}
# Try to identify clusters

DotPlot(
  first_singlets,
  features = unique(c("TPSAB1", "CD34", "MPO", "KIT", "GATA2", "TRH")),
  assay = "RNA"
)


```


```{r}
# Try to figure out with clusters 

FeaturePlot(first_singlets, features = c("CD2", "CD3D", "CD3E", "CD3G", "IKZF2", "CD8B"))

```


```{r}
# Try to figure out with clusters
DotPlot(first_singlets, features = c("MKI67", "HBB", "HBA2", "AHSP"))
```


```{r}
table(first_singlets$celltype)
```


```{r}
#first_singlets <- subset(first_singlets, seurat_clusters != 5)
#DimPlot(first_singlets, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
```



```{r}
# find markers for every cluster compared to all remaining cells, report only the positive ones
first_singlets.markers <- FindAllMarkers(
  first_singlets,
  only.pos = TRUE,
  min.pct = 0.05
) #cutoff for min % of cells in which genes are expressed

first_markers_top20 <- first_singlets.markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = avg_log2FC, n = 20) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC))


first_markers_strict <- first_singlets.markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 1) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC))


```



```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Create an Excel workbook and export marker gene tables for downstream inspection and reporting

wb <- createWorkbook()

addWorksheet(wb, "Top20_markers")
writeData(wb, "Top20_markers", first_markers_top20)

addWorksheet(wb, "Strict_markers_logFC_gt1")
writeData(wb, "Strict_markers_logFC_gt1", first_markers_strict)

saveWorkbook(
  wb,
  file = "JMML_cluster_markers_first_singlets_dims30_res1.4_seed42.xlsx",
  overwrite = TRUE
)



```



```{r}
# Main dot plot

DotPlot(first_singlets, features = c("HBB", "AHSP", "CPA3", "MKI67", "LYZ","S100A8"))
```



```{r}

top10.markers <- first.markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = avg_log2FC, n = 10)

top20.markers <- first.markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = avg_log2FC, n = 20)


top10.markers
top20.markers


```



```{r}
# Assign cell type labels to clusters, then refine annotation by splitting specific clusters
# using marker genes (MZB1 for Plasma vs B cells; CPA3 for Mast cells), and visualize final UMAP.

Idents(first_singlets) <- "seurat_clusters"

cluster2celltype_first <- c(
  "0"  = "Monocytes",
  "1"  = "IF Monocytes",
  "2"  = "Monocyte-like",
  "3"  = "cDC",
  "4"  = "MPP",
  "6"  = "Activated CD8 T",
  "7"  = "Macrophages",
  "8"  = "B Cells",                  # temporary label; will be split into Plasma below
  "9"  = "Treg Cells",
  "10" = "Granulocytic Progenitors",
  "11" = "Myeloid Blasts",
  "12" = "CD8 T cells",
  "13" = "Activated macrophages",
  "14" = "MPP",                      # temporary label; will extract Mast Cells below
  "15" = "Activated Treg Cells",
  "16" = "Erythroid Progenitors"
)

first_singlets$celltype <- unname(
  cluster2celltype_first[as.character(first_singlets$seurat_clusters)]
)

cells_cl8 <- WhichCells(first_singlets, idents = 8)
mz <- FetchData(first_singlets, vars = "MZB1")[cells_cl8, , drop = FALSE]

plasma_cells <- rownames(mz)[mz$MZB1 > 0]
b_cells      <- setdiff(cells_cl8, plasma_cells)

first_singlets$celltype[b_cells]      <- "B Cells"
first_singlets$celltype[plasma_cells] <- "Plasma Cells"

cells_cl14 <- WhichCells(first_singlets, idents = 14)
cp <- FetchData(first_singlets, vars = "CPA3")[cells_cl14, , drop = FALSE]

mast_cells <- rownames(cp)[cp$CPA3 > 0]
rest_cells <- setdiff(cells_cl14, mast_cells)

first_singlets$celltype[mast_cells] <- "Mast Cells"
first_singlets$celltype[rest_cells] <- "MPP"

table(first_singlets$celltype, useNA = "ifany")

#first_singlets <- subset(first_singlets, subset = celltype != "Unknown")

Idents(first_singlets) <- "celltype"

DimPlot(first_singlets, group.by = "celltype", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) + NoLegend()

```


```{r}
#to check
table(first_singlets$celltype)

```



```{r}
# Convert the Seurat object to SingleCellExperiment, ensure required assay layers exist,
# and export the dataset to .h5ad format for  CellTypist analysis.

library(zellkonverter)

sce_first <- as.SingleCellExperiment(first_singlets)

if (!"logcounts" %in% SummarizedExperiment::assayNames(sce_first)) {
  SummarizedExperiment::assay(sce_first, "logcounts") <- 
    GetAssayData(first_singlets, layer = "data")
}

SummarizedExperiment::assay(sce_first, "counts") <- 
  GetAssayData(first_singlets, layer = "counts")

writeH5AD(
  sce_first,
  "first_singlets_log1p10k.h5ad",
  X_name = "logcounts"
)


```

```{r}
# Load CellTypist prediction output and inspect basic structure of the table.

library(readr)

pred <- read_csv("first_JMML_AML/predicted_labels.csv")

head(pred)
colnames(pred)
```

```{r}
# Read CellTypist predictions, map predicted labels to Seurat cell barcodes,
# add them to Seurat metadata, and visualize the annotation on UMAP.

pred_first <- read.csv("first_JMML_AML//predicted_labels.csv", check.names = FALSE)  
head(pred_first)
colnames(pred_first)

cell_ids <- pred_first[[1]]

head(cell_ids)
mv <- pred_first$majority_voting
names(mv) <- cell_ids

length(intersect(Cells(first_singlets), names(mv)))

first_singlets$celltypist <- mv[Cells(first_singlets)]
table(first_singlets$celltypist, useNA = "ifany")

DimPlot(first_singlets, reduction = "umap", group.by = "celltypist", label = TRUE) +
  NoLegend()



```
